The energy barrier of the spike trimer's conformational transition is 25.44 kcal/mol
values of 43.98 kcal/mol and 32.69 kcal/mol
CG model provides a suitable alternative in mechanistic studies related to conformational change in large-scale protein machines

issues.claim: Key name implies Spike Protein, but value -112.94 and interpretation refer to ACLY
issues.reason: Text states -112.94 kcal/mol is the energy difference between E and E' for ACLY (Section 4), not Spike Protein. The key naming is factually inconsistent with the value.

success_verification_score.fix_suggestion: Rename the metric key to 'ACLY_free_energy_difference' to match the value and interpretation, or correct the value/interpretation to match Spike Protein data if available.
